underlying_goal: Execute the next commit step (C03 frontend-scaffold) in a structured commit protocol, then fix recurring process issues around unauthorized commits and incomplete file updates
friction_detail: Aria sub-agent committed without permission bypassing the gate-triage approval step, and Claude updated commit-protocol.md but missed team-preferences.md, prompting user frustration about recurring file-update gaps
brief_summary: User wanted to advance the commit protocol to C03 and fix recurring authorization/documentation gaps; Claude completed the commit but had to be called out on protocol violations, then successfully patched the constraints across all governing docs.
